title: Smart Automatic Water Dispenser System
description: Developed a smart touchless water dispenser system utilizing Arduino Uno, HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor, infrared sensor, relay module, and DC water pump. Implemented automatic cup detection and water level monitoring to ensure hygienic, efficient, and controlled dispensing. Conducted system design, circuit integration, software development, prototype fabrication, and performance evaluation.

title: Croissant Baking Temperature and Timer Control System
description: Developed an automated croissant baking system with temperature regulation and timer control. Utilized LM35 temperature sensing, LM741 comparator circuits, NE555 timer modules, relay switching, and seven-segment displays to ensure consistent baking performance and reduce manual intervention.

title: Automatic Ginger Dryer Temperature Control System
description: Developed an automatic temperature control system for ginger drying using Arduino Uno, LM35 temperature sensor, relay, and heater. Implemented an ON/OFF control method to regulate temperature and maintain stable drying conditions. Conducted system design, hardware integration, simulation, monitoring, and performance evaluation to improve process efficiency and reliability.

title: Quail Egg Incubator Temperature Control System
description: Developed a temperature-controlled quail egg incubator simulation using Arduino Uno, DS18B20 temperature sensor, relay, heater, and LCD display. Implemented automatic ON/OFF control to maintain optimal incubation temperatures, improving system stability and operational efficiency. Responsible for system design, simulation, wiring, and embedded programming.

title: Automatic Smart Trash Bin Using Arduino Uno and Ultrasonic Sensor
description: Designed and developed an automatic smart trash bin using Arduino Uno, HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor, and SG90 servo motor. The system automatically detects nearby objects and opens the lid without physical contact, improving hygiene and user convenience. Responsible for hardware integration, circuit assembly, sensor calibration, and Arduino programming.
